postToolUse.bash: mkdir -p .akr/logs; if [ "$TOOL_NAME" = "write_file" ] || [ "$TOOL_NAME" = "create_file" ] || [ "$TOOL_NAME" = "run_skill_script" ]; then TIMESTAMP=$(python3 -c 'import datetime; print(datetime.datetime.now(datetime.timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"))' 2>/dev/null || date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ" 2>/dev/null || echo "unavailable"); SESSION_DATE=$(python3 -c 'import datetime; print(datetime.datetime.now(datetime.timezone.utc).strftime("%Y%m%d"))' 2>/dev/null || date +"%Y%m%d" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown"); echo "{\"timestamp\": \"$TIMESTAMP\", \"tool\": \"$TOOL_NAME\", \"file\": \"$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH\"}" >> .akr/logs/session-$SESSION_DATE.jsonl; fi
